name: Access of Uninitialized Pointer
description: The product accesses or uses a pointer that has not been initialized, causing reads or writes to unexpected memory locations that can result in denial of service, information disclosure, or code execution if attackers can influence the uninitialized memory.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[pointer_declaration] is used at STORAGE[memory_access] without passing through a TRANSFORM[initialization] node that assigns a valid address, causing the uninitialized pointer to reference arbitrary memory
